title: MAKING THE RIGHT CHOICES | HG Amitasana Das | GITA LIFE Live
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: Hare Krishna a warm welcome to all of you for today's Gita live session it's a very
interesting topic today it's about making right choices
every day every moment life throws up many choices on us and the choices we
make has an impact on our future our destiny our life how to go about making
the right choices this is the topic which we are going to discuss in detail
based on the teachings of Lord Shri Krishna in the Bhagavad Gita so before
we get into the discussion get into the nitty-gritty of what constitutes right
choices let's seek the blessings of the Lord let's pray together please if
possible at your end you can also fold your hands and along with me you can
chant these prayers and after that we'll get into this discussion Nama om vishnu
Go Brahmane Hitaya Cha Jagadhitaya Krishnaya
So we are talking about choices.
Choices have a lot of impact on our lives.
The choices we make moment to moment.
The first aspect which we will cover today is the consequences of choices.
How important it is to make the right choices.
Although yes we will falter at times.
We will in spite of all good intentions end up making wrong choices.
What are the consequences of making the choices.
Right choices or the wrong choices.
First thing we have to understand is that Lord is equal to everyone.
Although there is lot of disparity in this world.
We see people who are fabulously rich.
And some people living in abject poverty.
Some people very healthy and healthy.
And some people are suffering from multiple diseases.
Some people are very very handsome good looking.
And some people are not so good looking.
There is lot of disparity in this world.
Although we see lot of disparity.
Krishna in the Gita says that I am equal to everyone.
And there is lot of disparity.
Although there is disparity he is saying I am equal to everyone.
We are where we are in our lives.
Whatever good or bad we are encountering.
It's the consequence of the choices we have made.
In this life or our previous lives.
